transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Willowbrook Care Navigation. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Patton. I have a work trip come up.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can help with that. Can I get your full name and date of birth?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Marcus. I see your appointment is this Thursday at 10 AM. What day works better for you?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Maybe the following Monday, if he has anything in the afternoon?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: He has an opening Monday at 2:15 PM. Would that work?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, I've moved your appointment to Monday at 2:15 PM with Dr. Patton. You'll get a confirmation text shortly.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Marcus. Have a safe trip and see you Monday.
